headerDisplay:
Dahua / Amcrest-compatible VTO door stations (CGI). **Tested:** DHI-VTO2211G-WP. **Expected:** VTO1201G and similar models with the same CGI API.

Enable **Debug** when testing another model, then open a [GitHub issue](https://github.com/roysbike/homebridge-dahua-vto/issues) with the logs.

debug.title: Debug logging
debug.description: Log CGI events, streams and talkback details. Use when testing other VTO models, then attach logs to a GitHub issue.

cameras.title: Door stations
cameras.description: One or more Dahua VTO / Amcrest-compatible door stations.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name shown in the Home app.

host.title: Host / IP
host.description: VTO IP address or hostname (not the Homebridge host).

twoWayAudio.title: Two-way audio
twoWayAudio.description: Home mic → VTO speaker via audio.cgi (G.711A).

hksv.title: HomeKit Secure Video
hksv.description: Optional. Enable after live view and talkback work. Requires HomePod/Apple TV + iCloud+.

debug.title: Debug (this device)
debug.description: Override platform debug for this door station only.

accessoryId.title: Stable accessory ID
accessoryId.description: Optional. Fixed ID for HomeKit UUID (default: name). Do not change after pairing.

enableMotionDetect.title: Enable VTO MotionDetect on start
enableMotionDetect.description: If motion detection is off on the VTO, turn it on at plugin start via configManager setConfig (needed for walk-by motion / HKSV).

cardSensor.title: Card access sensor
cardSensor.description: Contact sensor «Card Access» when a card/fob is presented (DoorCard / AccessControl).

exitAlarmIndex.title: Exit AlarmLocal index
exitAlarmIndex.description: AlarmLocal index for the exit button (VTO2111D / VTO2211G: usually 3).

model.title: Model
model.description: Optional override. Leave default to auto-fill from VTO (magicBox getSystemInfo), e.g. VTO2111D-P-S2.
